title: cyrtogonium repandum
intro: Cyrtogonium repandum, also known as the forked strap fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, fever, and skin infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Cyrtogonium repandum can be dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
